Ivys_Starter_House-from-abfielder.description: A cozy two-story wooden starter house with oak planks, a pitched roof, and a small garden area. Great for beginners.

smallTest.description: A small test structure for debugging. Simple cube of mixed blocks.

mediumTest.description: A medium-sized test structure with multiple rooms and basic furniture layout.

largeTest.description: A large test structure with complex geometry, multiple floors, and varied block palette.
